cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3550H with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
If you start this game without Proton it will run, but you can not code spells - tools doesn't apear in screen. If you run it with Proton it starts, but menu is inactive and you can not start the game. 
If you want to explore world and only use default spels you can play it. But main point of this game is creating your own spells and this part doesn't work.
